text: Hello and welcome to Real Easy English.
zh: 大家好,欢迎收听《Real Easy English》。

text: In this podcast we have real conversations in easy English to help you learn.
zh: 在这个播客里,我们会用简单的英语进行真实对话,帮助大家学习英语。

text: I'm Neil.
zh: 我是Neil。

text: And I'm Beth.
zh: 我是Beth。

text: Did you know you can watch a video of this podcast on our website?
zh: 你知道吗,你可以在我们的网站上看到这个播客的视频。

text: Go to bbclearningenglish .com Hi Beth, how are you today?
zh: 请访问 bbclearningenglish.com。嗨,Beth,你今天怎么样?

text: I'm very good, thank you.
zh: 我很好,谢谢。

text: Neil, how are you?
zh: Neil,你呢?

text: I'm very good.
zh: 我也很好。

text: What are we talking about?
zh: 我们今天要聊什么?

text: Well, today we are talking about waste.
zh: 嗯,今天我们要聊“垃圾”。

text: So that's what we call things that we don't want anymore, like rubbish or things that we've used and we now don't need them.
zh: 也就是我们不再想要的东西,比如废弃物,或者用过之后不再需要的东西。

text: So, for example, after I've eaten some crisps as a snack, the packet is rubbish, it's waste.
zh: 比如说,我吃完薯片当零食后,包装袋就是垃圾,是废弃物。

text: Are you good at dealing with waste?
zh: 你处理垃圾的能力怎么样?

text: I think so.
zh: 我觉得还不错。

text: I mean, at home we recycle.
zh: 我是说,我们家会回收垃圾。

text: We can recycle glass, plastic, metal, card, all the usual things that we recycle here in the UK.
zh: 我们可以回收玻璃、塑料、金属、纸板,这些在英国常见的可回收物。

text: What about you?
zh: 你呢?

text: Yeah, I do what I'm supposed to do.
zh: 是的,我也会做该做的事。

text: So we have a separate bin for different things, for plastic and for glass and for paper and for food.
zh: 我们家有不同的垃圾桶,分别装塑料、玻璃、纸和食物垃圾。

text: Yeah.
zh: 嗯。

text: When I was a kid, everything went in the same bin.
zh: 我小时候,所有垃圾都扔进同一个桶里。

text: Really?
zh: 真的吗?

text: Yeah.
zh: 是啊。

text: And now that seems really crazy and really bad.
zh: 现在想想那真是挺疯狂、挺糟糕的。

text: Yeah.
zh: 是啊。

text: So I think we are better now at dealing with waste, but probably there's more things we can do.
zh: 所以我觉得我们现在处理垃圾的方式好多了,但可能还能做得更好。

text: Yeah, I would think so.
zh: 是的,我也这么认为。

text: Yeah.
zh: 嗯。

text: Something that I do as well is when I'm in a supermarket, I try to not buy fruit and veg that's wrapped in plastic.
zh: 我自己还会做一件事,就是在超市买水果和蔬菜时,尽量不买用塑料包装的。

text: I'll always try and buy the individual products like apples on their own or, you know, a courgette.
zh: 我总是尽量买单个的产品,比如单独的苹果,或者一根西葫芦。

text: You don't need a courgette that's wrapped in plastic.
zh: 你其实不需要用塑料包着的西葫芦。

text: Well, that's a good idea.
zh: 嗯,这个想法不错。

text: But sometimes it's actually quite difficult to find things that aren't covered in plastic because we rely on plastic so much.
zh: 但有时候真的很难找到不被塑料包装的东西,因为我们太依赖塑料了。

text: Yeah, I know that is true.
zh: 是啊,这是事实。

text: You know what people do these days, which is great that they didn't used to do?
zh: 你知道现在人们会做一件很棒的事吗?以前可没人这样做。

text: Carry reusable water bottles.
zh: 就是随身携带可重复使用的水瓶。

text: That's true.
zh: 没错。

text: Almost everybody carries a bottle and just a few years ago people bought plastic bottles of water all the time.
zh: 几乎每个人都带着水瓶,而就在几年前,人们还老是买塑料瓶装水。

text: Yeah, I remember when I was teaching in a classroom
zh: 是啊,我记得我以前教书的时候,

text: and I'd sometimes have students They would come to London from all over the world and every day They would go to a supermarket and buy a plastic bottle and I used to I used to say sometimes,
zh: 有些学生从世界各地来伦敦学习,他们每天都会去超市买一瓶塑料瓶装水,我那时候常说,

text: you know What let's buy a reusable and then you're not using this plastic all the time.
zh: 我们买个可重复使用的水瓶吧,这样你就不用一直用这些塑料瓶了。

text: Yeah, we have a word for that Don't we single -use plastic?
zh: 是啊,我们有个词专门形容这个,对吧,叫“一次性塑料”。

text: Yeah, so we have to try and avoid single -use plastics.
zh: 对,所以我们得尽量避免使用一次性塑料。

text: What about water?
zh: 那水呢?

text: So water waste.
zh: 就是用水浪费的问题。

text: I really like having a bath just to relax, but sometimes I feel really guilty about it because it's using up quite a lot of water.
zh: 我很喜欢泡澡放松一下,但有时候我会有点内疚,因为这样会用掉不少水。

text: Yeah, I prefer showers, which is good because they use less water.
zh: 嗯,我更喜欢淋浴,这样比较好,因为用水更少。

text: So Beth, is there anything that you are planning to do to cut down further on the waste that you create?
zh: 那Beth,你有没有计划进一步减少你制造的垃圾呢?

text: I should probably have fewer baths.
zh: 我大概应该少泡几次澡。

text: I mean, I maybe have one a week.
zh: 我是说,我可能一周泡一次。

text: So, I mean, I shower too, of course.
zh: 当然,我也会淋浴。

text: But maybe I could have a bath less often, find other ways of relaxing which are less wasteful.
zh: 但也许我可以少泡澡一点,找些别的、不那么浪费的方式来放松。

text: What about you?
zh: 那你呢?

text: Anything you want to cut back on?
zh: 你有什么想减少的吗?

text: Yeah, I think we talked about single use plastic.
zh: 嗯,我们刚才提到一次性塑料。

text: You know, cling film, a very thin, like sheet, sheets of plastic that you wrap food in.
zh: 比如保鲜膜,那种很薄的塑料膜,用来包食物的。

text: Yeah.
zh: 对。

text: I always feel bad when I use that stuff.
zh: 每次用那个东西我都觉得挺内疚的。

text: But it's also really convenient and does its job well, keeping a sandwich together.
zh: 但它确实很方便,而且效果好,能把三明治包得严严实实的。

text: But I don't like it.
zh: 不过我还是不太喜欢它。

text: So I want to cut down down on my use of cling film.
zh: 所以我想减少使用保鲜膜。

text: Let's recap the vocabulary we heard in this conversation.
zh: 我们来回顾一下这次对话中学到的词汇。

text: We had waste.
zh: 我们讲到了“waste”(垃圾/浪费)。

text: is things that are unwanted, like rubbish.
zh: 指的是不需要的东西,比如垃圾。

text: And we can also describe something as a waste when someone uses something they don't need to, or they throw something away after not using it.
zh: 我们也可以用它来形容“浪费”,比如有人用了不必要用的东西,或者用都没用就扔掉了。

text: So, for example, when my kids don't finish their dinner, that's a waste.
zh: 比如说,我孩子没吃完饭,那就是一种浪费。

text: We heard single -use plastics.
zh: 我们还提到了“single-use plastics”(一次性塑料)。

text: These are plastic materials that we use once and then throw away.
zh: 指的是那种用一次就扔掉的塑料制品。

text: So, for example, food wrappers and shopping bags.
zh: 比如食品包装袋和购物袋。

text: We heard recycle, which means to collect rubbish in order to make materials that can be used again.
zh: 我们还讲到“recycle”(回收),意思是收集垃圾以便制成可再利用的材料。

text: We can also describe something as recyclable.
zh: 我们也可以说某样东西是“recyclable”(可回收的)。

text: It means it can be recycled, it can be used again.
zh: 意思是它可以被回收,可以再次利用。

text: And we had some common phrasal verbs that we use when talking about the environment.
zh: 我们还学到了一些谈论环境话题时常用的动词短语。

text: So we had rely on, which means need something in order to function.
zh: 比如“rely on”(依赖),意思是需要某样东西才能正常运作。

text: For example, we rely on plastic a lot in our daily lives.
zh: 比如说,我们在日常生活中很依赖塑料。

text: We can also say cut down on, which means to reduce something.
zh: 我们还可以说“cut down on”,意思是减少某样东西。

text: And we also hear cut back on.
zh: 我们也听到了“cut back on”。

text: So, for example, I want to cut back on single -use plastic.
zh: 比如说,我想减少一次性塑料的使用。

text: That's it for this episode of Real Easy English.
zh: 这就是本期《Real Easy English》的全部内容。

text: If you want to learn more phrasal verbs about the environment, then Georgie has made a whole video on this.
zh: 如果你想学习更多关于环境的动词短语,Georgie做了一整期视频来讲解。

text: You'll find the link in the notes below.
zh: 链接会放在下面的说明里。

text: See you then.
zh: 我们下次再见。

text: Bye!
zh: 拜拜!
